imagePrompt: A bold, hand-lettered illustration with the words 'Am I Wet or Just Crying?' in playful, slightly messy typography. Surrounding the text are cartoonish teardrop shapes in varying sizes with mid-tone teal, dusty pink, and burnt orange fills, each outlined in a dark charcoal stroke. Small bright accents in lime and neon yellow add an energetic pop. Transparent background, crisp bold linework, no photorealism.
printReadyPrompt: Bold, hand-drawn typography with varying stroke weights for visual impact. Dual-mode palette: dark near-black outline, mid-tone fills (teal, dusty pink, burnt orange), and bright lime/neon yellow accents for contrast. Design is scalable to fit a shower curtain size while retaining clarity and humor.
